# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: MyWebApp
    location: East US
    properties:
      serverFarmId: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/{appServicePlanName}
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: ConnectionStrings__MyDatabase
            value: Server=my-sql-database.mysql.database.azure.com;Database=MyDatabase;User Id=db-username;Password=db-password;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: my-sql-database
    location: East US
    properties:
      administratorLogin: db-username
      administratorPassword: db-password
      version: "12.0"
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: mystorage
    location: East US
    properties:
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accessTier: Hot
outputs:
  - name: appServiceConnectionString
    value: $(MyWebApp.PrimaryConnectionString)
  - name: databaseConnectionString
    value: $(my-sql-database.ConnectionString)
